title: Cycle ship stages the whole worktree: cross-lane untracked files become shippable hazards - stage the build-report's declared paths only
root_cause: The ship phase auto-stages the entire worktree (git add -A semantics) instead of the paths the cycle actually changed. Under fleet concurrency a worktree can carry another lane's untracked artifacts (cycle 645: TDD-red go/internal/topngate/*_test.go, undefined symbols - committing them would turn main CI red); the same whole-tree behavior bit the operator release flow (attestation STALE unless runtime state is quarantined first). Companion defect: repo-wide graders (go test ./...) go environmentally red from the same pollution even when the cycle's own diff is clean (cycle 645 D-645-GRADER-SCOPE).
evidence: .evolve/runs/cycle-645/retrospective-report.md (D-645-HYGIENE + D-645-GRADER-SCOPE + root cause 2, flagged SYSTEMIC: cycle-92, cycle-93, warnship_apicover_ci_gap family 413/516-522); stage-lesson-2.yaml pattern another-lanes-untracked-tdd-red-files-in-worktree-plus-whole-tree-ship; operator standing rule git_add_explicit_paths.
fix: Ship stages an explicit path set derived from the cycle's own evidence: the build-report's declared files plus git diff --name-only against the worktree base SHA - never the whole tree. Unexpected untracked/modified paths outside that set produce a loud ship-hygiene report (and under enforce, a block), not a silent commit. Companion: cycle graders that run repo-wide tests must scope to touched packages (or skip the Go suite when the diff contains no .go files), aligning with the ADR-0069 CI-parity gate's touched-pkg scoping.
acceptance: Regression test reproducing cycle-645: worktree with an out-of-set untracked red test file ships ONLY the declared paths; the stray file is reported, never committed
Attestation/tree-SHA binding still holds for the staged subset (commit-gate parity test)
Grader scoping: docs-only diff no longer runs repo-wide go test (or runs it non-blocking) - fixture asserts the 645 false-red cannot recur
go test -race on touched packages PASS; apicover clean
source: operator-injection from cycle-645 retrospective (systemic worktree-state vs ship-tree-state family)
operator_note: PARTIAL: manifest-gate MECHANISM landed 5cd4d99d + prereq #1 (pathToken bare-root-file extraction) DONE 42b07fad (2026-07-14, operator TDD, both reviewers Approve, CI green) — pathToken now extracts CHANGELOG.md/go.mod via an extension allow-list + left-boundary check (dotfiles clean non-match), so enforce no longer FALSE-BLOCKS legit root-file changes. REMAINING (all DORMANT until an operator activates enforce — the default is shadow, so the enforce error path never fires): (2) dedicated core.CodeManifestGate (not CodeGitStageFailed) for ledger/debugger triage; (3) policy.json manifest_gate -> Options.ManifestGate wiring (mirror ReportSizeGate) so enforce is activatable by config; (4) OPTIONAL targeted-staging instead of block — deferred (silent-work-loss risk; fail-loud block is safer). Weight 0.72->0.55: the real bug (pathToken) is fixed; (2)(3) are plumbing for an off-by-default feature, low value until the operator wants enforce active.
